calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Mandatory Dismissal
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE SAN FRANCISCO Motion for Mandatory Dismissal. Appearances: Rebecca Liu, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3870 appearing for Respondent and Moving party; Curtis E. Allen, Esq. Attorney at Law, (650) 868-6620 appearing for Petitioner and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for mandatory dismissal granted with prejudice under CCP section 583.310 because the mandatory five year time limit to bring a suit to trial has expired. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Mtn For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER AUSTIN WILSON Motion for Peremptory Writ of Mandamus. Appearances: Rebecca Liu, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3870 appearing for Respondent and opposing party; Curtis E. Allen, Esq. Attorney at Law, (650) 868-6620 appearing for Petitioner and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion off calendar as moot in view of ruling on respondent's motion to dismiss. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Mtn For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jan-22-2010 Continued To Feb-23-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER AUSTIN WILSON Motion for Peremptory Writ of Mandamus. Appearances: Rebecca Liu, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF (415) 554-3870 appearing for Respondent and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to February 23, 2010 to be heard with Respondent's motion to dismiss. Order re: continuance date signed in open Court.(302/PHA)Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER AUSTIN WILSON Motion For Order Sealing Admin Record Lodged With The Court. No appearances on this matter.
